{%- set CAT = ["TG","TE","SE","OA","FD","GP","OT"] -%} {%- set CAT_LABEL = {"TG":"Transport-Goods","TE":"Transport-Employee","SE":"Spares/Engineering","OA":"Office/Admin","FD":"Food","GP":"Geeprint","OT":"Other"} -%} {%- set VEHICLES = ["KAP 466","KAY 635","KCB 430","KBQ 788","KBT 972"] -%} {%- set DAYS = ["Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri","Sat"] -%} {%- set DAY_FULL = {"Mon":"Monday","Tue":"Tuesday","Wed":"Wednesday","Thu":"Thursday","Fri":"Friday","Sat":"Saturday"} -%} {# -------- Voucher totals (inline filters, no dict mutation) -------- #} {%- set s = namespace(cat_in=0, voucher_out=0, pc=0, etr=0, used=0) -%} {%- set s.cat_in = doc.vouchers | selectattr("cash_in") | sum(attribute="amount") -%} {%- set s.voucher_out = doc.vouchers | rejectattr("cash_in") | sum(attribute="amount") -%} {%- set s.pc = doc.vouchers | selectattr("pc_received") | list | length -%} {%- set s.etr = doc.vouchers | selectattr("etr_received") | list | length -%} {%- for v in doc.vouchers -%} {%- if v.voucher_no or v.recipient or (v.amount or 0) %}{% set s.used = s.used + 1 %}{% endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {# -------- Parking totals (inline filters, no dict mutation) -------- #} {%- set pk = namespace(total=0) -%} {%- set pk.total = doc.parking_entries | sum(attribute="amount") -%} {# -------- Bike / Forklift (inline filters) -------- #} {%- set mz = namespace(bike=0, fork=0) -%} {%- set mz.bike = doc.misc_entries | selectattr("kind","equalto","Bike Fuel") | sum(attribute="amount") -%} {%- set mz.fork = doc.misc_entries | selectattr("kind","equalto","Forklift") | sum(attribute="amount") -%} {%- set bike_rows = (doc.misc_entries | selectattr("kind","equalto","Bike Fuel") | list) -%} {%- set fork_rows = (doc.misc_entries | selectattr("kind","equalto","Forklift") | list) -%} {# -------- Wages / Loans (inline filters) -------- #} {%- set wl = namespace(wages=0, loans=0) -%} {%- set wl.wages = doc.wages_entries | sum(attribute="amount") -%} {%- set wl.loans = doc.loan_entries | sum(attribute="amount_issued") -%} {# -------- Week dates (Mon..Sat ending on the Friday) -------- #} {%- set monday = frappe.utils.add_days(doc.week_ending, -4) if doc.week_ending else None -%}

CASH MOVEMENT

A. Opening Balance (start of week){{ "{:,.0f}".format(doc.opening_balance or 0) }}
B. Total Cash OUT (vouchers + vehicle + bike + forklift + wages + loans){{ "{:,.0f}".format(doc.total_out or 0) }}
C. Total Cash IN (refunds){{ "{:,.0f}".format(doc.total_in or 0) }}
D. EXPECTED CLOSING = A − B + C{{ "{:,.0f}".format(doc.expected_close or 0) }}

PHYSICAL RECONCILIATION

E. Physical Cash Count (end of week){{ "{:,.0f}".format(doc.cash_count_end or 0) }}
F. Sum of Open Vouchers (cash out)
G. AUTHORISED FLOAT{{ "{:,.0f}".format(doc.authorised_float or 0) }}
H. VARIANCE = E − D{{ "{:,.0f}".format(doc.variance or 0) }}

NOTE: All wages and loans paid in cash are recorded here. The recipient signature on this sheet IS the supporting evidence — no petty cash voucher slip or ETR receipt is required for these entries. Tick PAYE for any payment requiring statutory deduction.
